# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent envoy no tls.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.tls_inspector
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/api/users" }
                route:
                  cluster: users_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match: { prefix: "/api/products" }
                route:
                  cluster: products_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match: { prefix: "/api/orders" }
                route:
                  cluster: orders_service
                  timeout: 30s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
  clusters:
  - name: users_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        service_name: users_service
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: users-service, port_value: 8080 }
  - name: products_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        service_name: products_service
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: products-service, port_value: 8080 }
  - name: orders_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        service_name: orders_service
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: orders_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: orders-service, port_value: 8080 }
admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 8001 }
